name: HashKey Capital Tokenized Fund Series

custodian.name: HashKey Custody / Standard Chartered SC Ventures

auditor.name: Big Four (specific firm not publicly disclosed)

summary: First tokenized fund licensed under Hong Kong SFC framework integrating Type 9 asset management with token-based subscription/redemption. Targets professional investors (PI) under Hong Kong SFO. Multiple sub-funds covering money market, fixed income, and digital asset exposure. Significant as HK's first concrete attempt to bridge SFC's licensed asset management regime with on-chain settlement — a key building block for HK's ambition to become a regulated tokenization hub.

sources.title: HashKey Capital announcement on tokenized fund
HK SFC: Circular on tokenization of investment products (November 2023)

underlying_asset: Multiple sub-funds: money market, fixed income, digital asset trackers. Underlying assets per fund prospectus.
reserve_composition: Per-fund: typically T-bills/money market for the cash management fund; varies by fund.
secondary_market: Token transfer restricted to whitelisted professional investors; limited secondary liquidity.
oracle_provider: Fund administrator reports NAV; no third-party on-chain oracle.
redemption_mechanism: Subscription and redemption via HashKey platform; typically daily/weekly NAV.
upgrade_authority: HashKey Capital fund management under SFC oversight.

timeline.event: First tokenized fund launched under HK SFC tokenization circular framework
Additional sub-funds added for fixed income and digital asset exposure
